title: Tough as Nails redesign
description: A simple pack that redesign tough as nails. Contains armor, items, effects, misc and blocks
body:
# !!! This project is discontinued !!!
## Tough as Nails redesign
### This a a resourse-pack that overhauls tough as nails textures
**Currently Consists of**

- **Leaf Armor**
- **Tempature Icon**
- **Thirst Icon**
- **Effects**
- **Blocks**
- **Hyperthermia screen effect**

~~~~

~~~~
